landing.heroTitle: Magical Bedtime Stories for Your Child ✨
landing.heroHighlight: Personalized with their name, language & beautiful art
landing.heroDescription: Create custom bedtime stories with your child's name, in their favorite language, with beautiful illustrations and inspiring values.
landing.howDesc: Three simple steps and the story is ready.
landing.step1Desc: Name, age, appearance, personality — for a truly unique story.
landing.step2Desc: Space, animals, adventure — you pick the topic and the moral lesson.
landing.step3Desc: A complete story with artwork, voice narration, and PDF export.
landing.featuresDesc: Everything you need to make bedtime a magical moment.
landing.feat1Desc: Stories in Arabic, English, and French — pick your child's favorite language.
landing.feat2Desc: Every story comes with a charming illustration in a children's book style.
landing.feat3Desc: Listen to the story read aloud — perfect when your hands are busy.
landing.feat4Desc: Download the story as a beautiful PDF — print it or share it with family.
landing.feat5Desc: Add up to 4 children with different profiles and personalized stories for each.
landing.feat6Desc: All stories are age-appropriate with positive values — no worrying content.
landing.testimonialsDesc: Real reviews from families who use Dreemi every night.
landing.test1Text: My kids ask for a Dreemi story every night! The stories are personalized with their names and it makes them so happy.
landing.test2Text: The best children's story app I've used. The educational values in every story give me peace of mind as a parent.
landing.test3Text: The voice narration feature is amazing! I play the story for my daughter and she falls asleep peacefully.
landing.ctaDesc: 3 free stories every month — no credit card required. Start now and create your child's first magical bedtime story.
landing.pricingDesc: Start for free, upgrade when you need more.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what information Dreemi collects, how we use it, and the choices and rights available to you. By using Dreemi, you agree to the practices described below.

dataWeCollect.title: Information we collect
body: We collect information you provide directly when you create an account, use the service, or contact us.
We also collect limited technical information needed to operate and secure the app.
bullets: Account data: name and email address.
Child profile data: child's name, age, and optional appearance/preferences you choose to provide (e.g., gender, skin tone, hair color, personality, hobbies, favorite animal).
Story data: themes you enter, generated story content, and any saved stories.
Payment/subscription data: subscription status and identifiers handled via our payments provider (we do not store your full card number).
Technical data: basic logs and device/browser information used for security, troubleshooting, and performance.

howWeUse.title: How we use information
body: We use your information to provide and improve Dreemi.
bullets: Create and manage your account and preferences.
Generate personalized stories and illustrations based on your inputs.
Provide audio playback and PDF export features.
Maintain safety, security, and prevent abuse.
Improve the quality of the service (e.g., debugging, analytics, performance).

thirdParties.title: Sharing with third parties
body: We use trusted service providers to operate Dreemi. These providers process data on our behalf, only as needed to deliver the service.
bullets: AI providers (e.g., OpenAI, Mistral): to generate story text and/or illustrations from your prompts and child profile details.
Payments provider (Stripe): to process subscriptions, billing, and receipts.
Hosting/infrastructure providers: to run the app securely and reliably.

yourRights.title: Your rights (GDPR)
body: Depending on your location, you may have rights under privacy laws including GDPR.
bullets: Access: request a copy of your personal data.
Rectification: correct inaccurate information.
Erasure: delete your account and associated data.
Portability: export your data in a usable format.
Restriction/objection: object to certain processing where applicable.

children.title: Children's privacy (COPPA)
body: Dreemi is designed for parents/guardians to create bedtime stories for children.
We do not knowingly allow children to create accounts. Child-related information is provided by parents/guardians for the purpose of story personalization.
bullets: If you believe a child has provided personal information without parental consent, contact us and we will take appropriate action.
Parents/guardians can request access, correction, or deletion of child profile data at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies
body: We may use cookies or similar technologies to keep you signed in, remember preferences, and protect the service.
bullets: Essential cookies: required for authentication and security.
Preference cookies: remember language and settings.
Analytics/troubleshooting: help us understand performance and errors (where enabled).

contact.title: Contact
body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your data, contact us at privacy@dreemi.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of Dreemi. By accessing or using the service, you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
body: By creating an account or using Dreemi, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms.
If you do not agree, you must not use the service.

service.title: Service description
body: Dreemi provides tools to create personalized bedtime stories, including optional illustrations, audio playback, and PDF export.
We may update or change features from time to time.

accounts.title: User accounts and responsibility
body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and for all activity under your account.
You must provide accurate information and keep it up to date.
You agree not to misuse the service, interfere with its operation, or attempt unauthorized access.

payments.title: Subscriptions, billing, and refunds
body: Paid plans are billed in advance on a recurring basis according to the plan you select.
Payments are processed by Stripe.
bullets: You can manage or cancel your subscription from your account settings or the billing portal.
If you cancel, your plan may remain active until the end of the billing period.
Refunds, if any, are provided at our discretion or where required by law.

ip.title: Intellectual property
body: The Dreemi app, brand, and software are owned by Dreemi and protected by applicable laws.
Generated stories: as between you and Dreemi, you own the stories you generate using your account, subject to these Terms.
bullets: You grant us a limited license to process your inputs solely to provide the service.
You are responsible for the prompts and inputs you provide.

prohibited.title: Prohibited content and conduct
body: You agree not to generate, upload, or share content that is illegal, harmful, or violates the rights of others.
bullets: Hate, harassment, or violence.
Sexual content involving minors.
Content that infringes intellectual property or privacy.
Attempts to exploit or bypass safety features.

termination.title: Termination
body: You may stop using Dreemi at any time and may delete your account from settings.
We may suspend or terminate access if we believe you violated these Terms or if necessary to protect the service or users.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
body: Dreemi is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, Dreemi will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.

law.title: Governing law
body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in your jurisdiction, unless mandatory laws provide otherwise.

contact.title: Contact
body: For questions about these Terms, contact us at legal@dreemi.app.
